title: farsetia nummularia
intro: Farsetia nummularia, also known as coin-flower, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Farsetia nummularia include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
